action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 8 (30 epochs, timm Mixup) achieved 0.6792, which is worse than Iteration 5 (25 epochs, custom mixup) at 0.705. Analysis: The difference is likely due to the OneCycleLR schedule being stretched over 30 epochs instead of 25, or subtle differences between timm's Mixup and the custom mixup implementation. Decision: Revert exactly to 25 epochs and use the custom mixup implementation to recover the 0.705 performance. I will also add RandomErasing(p=0.2) to slightly improve regularization and generalization.
